name: Text Embedding Daemon
description: Local BGE text embedding service. Loads the model once and serves /embed_texts over HTTP so prompt/block text embedding shares one warm model instead of spawning a subprocess that reloads the model (~15-25s) every call — the cause of the composer's 'find similar prompts' 30s timeout. /health detects warm-up and wedges. Backend falls back to a one-shot subprocess when this is down.

settings.description: HTTP port the text embedding daemon listens on
Public base URL consumers reach the daemon at (empty = auto-derived from port and exported to every service as PIXSIM_TEXT_EMBEDDING_BASE_URL)
